before: public decimal GetTotal(Order o){ if(o!=null){ if(o.IsActive){ if(o.Items!=null){ if(o.Items.Count>0){ return o.Items.Sum(i=>i.Price); } else { return 0; } } else { return 0; } } else { return 0; } } return 0; }
after: public decimal GetTotal(Order order){ if (order == null) return 0; if (!order.IsActive) return 0; if (order.Items == null || order.Items.Count == 0) return 0; return order.Items.Sum(i => i.Price); }
why_safe: Same null checks and return values; nesting reduced with guard clauses only.

before: public string Classify(int score){ if(score>=90){ return "A"; } else { if(score>=80){ return "B"; } else { if(score>=70){ return "C"; } else { return "F"; } } } }
after: public string Classify(int score){ if (score >= 90) return "A"; if (score >= 80) return "B"; if (score >= 70) return "C"; return "F"; }
why_safe: All conditions and return values preserved; else-if chain flattened with early returns.
